description_long: A person dressed in a full-body hooded jumpsuit stands upright, with the suit featuring multiple utility pockets and reinforced sections on the arms and legs. The face is painted with a white mask-like makeup and a red smile, giving a clown-like appearance, while the hood is pulled up, obscuring the hair. Black gloves cover the hands, and the individual wears sturdy, lace-up boots suitable for urban environments. Straps and harnesses are visible across the chest and thighs, suggesting tactical or utility use, and there are small pouches and holsters attached to the suit. The overall look is utilitarian and slightly intimidating, blending elements of workwear and costume. The figure appears prepared for activity in a city or industrial setting, with accessories that hint at readiness for action or performance.
description: A person in a hooded utility jumpsuit with a white clown-like face, black gloves, and tactical accessories, standing upright in sturdy boots.
description_view_0: Front view shows the hooded jumpsuit, white face makeup, black gloves, and visible utility pockets and harnesses.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hood, facial makeup, arm and leg reinforcements, and strapped accessories.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back harness, hood, and utility pockets, with boots and gloves visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the side profile of the hood, face, and the arrangement of straps and pouches on the suit.
attribute_clothing_type: full-body hooded jumpsuit with utility pockets, tactical harness, and reinforced sections
